## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Cresta's CX AI product suite for content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Holistic CX Strategy:** Cresta's platform is modular, enabling customers to start with any of three pillars—Analyze, Augment, or Automate—to solve specific, funded problems.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [**AI-Powered Insights:** AI Analyst provides natural language root-cause analysis of 100% of conversations, replacing manual sampling to identify systemic issues (e.g., a bad website flow) and inform business strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Agent Augmentation:** Cresta automates 60–68% of Quality Management (QM) tasks, freeing supervisors to coach more effectively and enabling a 40% increase in the agent-to-supervisor ratio.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [**Seamless Automation:** AI Agent handles transactional tasks, using an Agent Operations Center to enable human supervisors to provide real-time guidance on complex issues, preserving containment and preventing escalations.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)

## Topics

### Cresta's CX AI Philosophy

  - [Cresta's strategy is to match the right AI solution to each conversation type, avoiding a "automate everything" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**1. Eliminate:** Solve root causes of unnecessary conversations (e.g., product bugs, policy issues) using insights to build an ROI case for business-wide fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**2. Automate:** Use AI Agents for efficient, transactional tasks where speed and accuracy are the primary customer value drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**3. Augment:** Equip human agents with AI tools for high-value or emotionally complex conversations, where human empathy is critical.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**4. Proactive:** Enable new, value-add customer engagements that are too expensive for humans alone.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Pillar 1: Analyze (Cresta Insights)

  - [**Topic Discovery:** Visualizes conversation topics, correlating them with KPIs like AHT and CSAT to find inefficient or low-resolution areas.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [**AI Analyst:** A natural language query tool for deep root-cause analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Function:** Asks open-ended questions (e.g., "Why are conversations unresolved?") to analyze 100% of transcripts and provide a summarized report with evidence.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Impact:** Replaces manual sampling (1–2% coverage) to identify systemic issues.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [**Use Case (United Airlines):** Identified a confusing website flow for basic economy fares, which was driving millions of dollars in contact center costs and was subsequently fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Pillar 2: Augment (Performance & Coaching)

  - [**Performance Insights:** Automates behavior adherence scoring for 100% of interactions against a custom scorecard.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Function:** Identifies coaching opportunities by comparing individual agent performance to team averages.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Impact:** Reduces QM team overhead by 50–60% and increases the agent-to-supervisor ratio by \~40%, reallocating staff to higher-value coaching.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [**Coaching Hub:** Provides supervisors with a proactive view of coachable moments, enabling them to build and monitor targeted coaching plans.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [**Opera (Real-time Agent Assist):** A no-code engine to deploy real-time guidance based on insights.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
      - [**Function:** Delivers contextual hints, guided workflows, and knowledge articles to agents.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
      - [**Behavior Detection:** Uses Small Language Models (SLMs) trained via natural language and user feedback to accurately detect nuanced behaviors (e.g., "overcoming an objection") in real time.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)

### Pillar 3: Automate (AI Agent & Seamless Handover)

  - [**AI Agent Architecture:** Uses a sub-agent approach, combining specialized, task-specific agents (e.g., for lost cards, address changes) with a routing agent to handle complex, multi-intent requests.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2320.0)
  - [**Agent Operations Center (AOC):** A human-in-the-loop management system for AI Agents.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)
      - [**Function:** Allows AI Agents to "raise their hand" for supervisor guidance on complex or out-of-bounds issues (e.g., compliance, pricing exceptions).](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)
      - [**Impact:** Preserves containment and prevents unnecessary escalations to human queues, allowing one supervisor to manage hundreds of AI conversations simultaneously.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
  - [**Seamless Handover Demo:**](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2490.0)
      - [**Scenario:** A customer's chat request for a lost card was handled by the AI Agent, which also identified a fraudulent transaction and updated the customer's address.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
      - [**Escalation:** The customer then requested an HYSA account, triggering a seamless voice handover to a human agent.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
      - [**Context Transfer:** The human agent received the full conversation history and context, enabling a smooth transition and eliminating the need for the customer to repeat information.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=2861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:** Review the "Master product and feature slide deck" to create a product feature matrix for content development.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=3564.0)
  - [**Erik:** Follow up with Cresta if any questions arise.](https://fathom.video/share/NyhMRUH9schPPWD2UcNe98CP7dJUQ5Jn?tab=summary&timestamp=3656.0)
